rationale: ADR/process lens. All 7 citations (0040/0037/0036/0035/0034/0032/0039) exist, are Accepted, and each lists `workflow` in Domain(s) (parse.go splitTopLevel + normalizeStatus), so none trips adr-cite-irrelevant; each genuinely constrains a bead. ADR-0030's real domains are execution/validation/lifecycle/lint (no workflow) — citing it WOULD fire adr-cite-irrelevant, so the deliberate omission is correct. Coverage passes: workflow is covered by multiple cited Accepted ADRs (coveredAccepted). Confirmed empirically: `mindspec validate plan 110` exits 0 with only the pre-empted advisory WARN decomposition-scope-redundancy R=0.11. Process: 5 bead sections == 5 contiguous work_chunks, deps (4<-1,5<-4) in range/acyclic (ValidateWorkChunkAlignment passes), step counts 5/5/4/5/5 all in 3-7, each bead has Verification+AC+Depends, doc-sync honored per bead on disjoint workflow docs. Frontmatter shape matches approved 112; Draft/no-bead_ids is the correct pre-approval shape. Divergence report accurate.
findings: Verified against ADR files at SHA e86082d6: ADR-0040 (core,workflow), 0037 (workflow,execution), 0036 (workflow,validation,doc-sync,ownership), 0035 (workflow,execution,core), 0034 (workflow), 0032 (validation,adr,lifecycle,workflow), 0039 (core,workflow,execution,context-system) — all Accepted, all intersect the sole impacted domain `workflow`; no adr-cite-irrelevant/adr-cite-missing/adr-coverage-missing fires.
ADR-0030 correctly omitted: its Domain(s) are execution,validation,lifecycle,lint — intersectFold vs [workflow] is empty, so citing it fires adr-cite-irrelevant as the ADR Fitness claims.

plan-approve gate ground-truthed: internal/approve/plan.go runs ValidatePlan (HasFailures=false here) then ValidateWorkChunkAlignment (5 chunks/5 sections, deps in-range, no cycle) — both accept this plan. `mindspec validate plan 110` exits 0.

MINOR (non-gating): the ADR Fitness parenthetical states ADR-0030 'Domain(s): execution', understating its four actual domains (execution/validation/lifecycle/lint). The load-bearing conclusion (none is workflow -> would fire adr-cite-irrelevant) is unaffected, so this is a cosmetic narrative imprecision, not a blocker.

Doc-sync per bead honored on disjoint workflow docs (B1 interfaces.md, B2 architecture.md, B3 overview.md, B4 interfaces.md after B1 merges, B5 runbook.md); all four workflow domain docs exist on disk. Git status left clean after read-only checks.
